hard_food_rules_subject_check.name: hard_food_rules_subject_check
hard_food_rules_subject_check.value: "hard_food_rules"."food_entity_id" IS NOT NULL OR "hard_food_rules"."raw_subject" IS NOT NULL

taste_preferences_subject_check.name: taste_preferences_subject_check
taste_preferences_subject_check.value: "taste_preferences"."food_entity_id" IS NOT NULL OR "taste_preferences"."raw_subject" IS NOT NULL

household_meals_recipe_source_check.value: "household_meals"."user_recipe_id" IS NOT NULL OR "household_meals"."recipe_snapshot_json" IS NOT NULL

meal_check_ins_subject_check.name: meal_check_ins_subject_check
meal_check_ins_subject_check.value: "meal_check_ins"."household_meal_id" IS NOT NULL OR "meal_check_ins"."user_recipe_id" IS NOT NULL
